description: For a client developing a new product, an agent must conduct a preliminary patent search for similar inventions.

nodes.task_description: Based on a product description, identify key technical terms to use as search keywords.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent extracts relevant keywords like 'wearable', 'haptic feedback', 'navigation'.

nodes.task_description: Search patent databases (e.g., USPTO, Google Patents) using the identified keywords.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent executes searches on patent databases.

nodes.task_description: Summarize the top 5 most relevant existing patents found, including their title, abstract, and assignee.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a concise summary of potentially conflicting patents.
